column8: We (not to send) them the message tomorrow.
column9: She (not to get) up at 6 o'clock tomorrow.
column10: He (to go) to the gym next week
column11: Our neighbors (to move) to Germany next month.
column12: Look! Jane (to swim) across the lake.
column13: My cousin (to look) for a job.
column14: I (to have) dinner with my friends at the moment and I am very happy to see them again.
column16: Look at the dog. It (to go) to bite you.
column17: Get back! The bomb (to go) to explode.
column18: I (to go) to get some milk.
column19: I (to go) to wear my new skirt for the party.
